stepAnswer: Null: Cheese types follow the employee distribution. Alt: Cheese types do not follow the employee distribution.
stepTitle: A) Write a valid null and alternative hypothesis for this experiment.
choices: Null: Chloe’s sample is too small. Alt: Chloe’s sample is large enough.
Null: Cheese types follow the employee distribution. Alt: Cheese types do not follow the employee distribution.
Null: Gruyère will never appear. Alt: Gruyère will always appear.
Null: The mean cheese type is correct. Alt: The median cheese type is incorrect.
